title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 266.301 - Permit required to sell fertilizer — application
text:
266.301.  Permit required to sell fertilizer — application. — It shall be unlawful for any distributor to sell, offer for sale or expose for sale for consumption or use in this state any fertilizer without first securing a permit from the fertilizer control board.  Such permit shall expire on the thirtieth day of June of each year.  Application for such permit shall be on forms furnished by the fertilizer control board.
(L. 1953 p. 9 § 266.300, A.L. 2016 S.B. 655)
